message:
test(harness): add forensics navigator and watchdog integration tests, sync beads

- Add bd_mblr_7_5_forensics.rs: integration tests for the forensics
  navigator module covering corruption analysis workflows, evidence
  chain construction, and structured reporting.
- Add bd_mblr_7_8_watchdog.rs: integration tests for the watchdog
  subsystem covering health monitoring, alert thresholds, and
  recovery trigger conditions.
- Sync beads issue tracker with current task state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
